title: agrostis stolonifera subsp. palustris
intro: Agrostis stolonifera subsp. palustris, also known as marsh bentgrass, is a subspecies of grass that grows in wetland areas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of marsh bentgrass include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, making it a valuable asset in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of marsh bentgrass include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
